title: Low-side current sense into ADC
prompt: I want to measure how much current a load draws on my ESP32-WROOM-32 board using a small low-side shunt resistor in the load's ground return. The tiny voltage across the shunt should go to an ADC input so firmware can compute the current. For the bench check assume the load is pulling about 200 mA and the shunt is sized so the sensed voltage is a small fraction of the ADC range (around 0.2 V).
